items.definition_en: A cupboard door is the movable part that covers the opening of a cupboard.
items.example_en: She replaced the old cupboard door in the kitchen.

items.definition_en: A shoe cabinet is a piece of furniture for storing shoes.
items.example_en: The hallway has a small shoe cabinet for guests.

items.definition_en: A wine rack is a furniture piece for holding bottles of wine.
items.example_en: We keep our wine bottles on the wine rack in the dining room.

items.definition_en: A bed frame is the structure that supports a mattress.
items.example_en: They bought a new bed frame for their bedroom.

items.definition_en: A vanity unit is a bathroom cabinet combined with a sink.
items.example_en: Our bathroom has a white vanity unit under the mirror.

items.definition_en: A storage ottoman is a padded seat with space inside for storing items.
items.example_en: She keeps blankets in the storage ottoman in the living room.

items.definition_en: A breakfast bar is a counter used for eating informal meals in a kitchen.
items.example_en: We sit at the breakfast bar every morning.

items.definition_en: A murphy bed is a bed that folds away into a wall or cabinet.
items.example_en: He installed a murphy bed to save space in the studio.

items.definition_en: A media console is a low cabinet for holding a tv and electronics.
items.example_en: The living room media console holds our TV and games.

items.definition_en: A crib rail is the protective side of a baby's bed.
items.example_en: He put covers on the crib rail for safety.

items.definition_en: A loft bed is a raised bed with open space underneath.
items.example_en: My son sleeps in a loft bed to save floor space.

items.definition_en: An extendable table is a table that can become larger when needed.
items.example_en: We use the extendable table for big family dinners.

items.definition_en: A glass cabinet is a furniture piece with glass doors for displaying items.
items.example_en: She keeps her dishes in a glass cabinet in the dining room.

items.definition_en: A twin bed is a narrow bed for one person.
items.example_en: The guest room has a twin bed by the window.

items.definition_en: A hall tree is a furniture piece for hanging coats, hats, and storing shoes.
items.example_en: The hall tree by the door keeps our entryway tidy.

items.definition_en: A window seat is a bench built under a window for sitting.
items.example_en: She likes to read on the window seat in the afternoon.

items.definition_en: A drop-leaf table is a table with foldable sides for saving space.
items.example_en: The kitchen has a drop-leaf table for extra guests.

items.definition_en: Hutches are shelves or cabinets placed on top of lower furniture.
items.example_en: The dining room hutch displays her china collection.

items.definition_en: A glass coffee table is a living room table with a glass top.
items.example_en: She puts fresh flowers on the glass coffee table.

items.definition_en: A crib mattress is a small bed mattress made for a crib.
items.example_en: He bought an organic crib mattress for their baby.
